description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Functional Tests that runs on every push and on pull requests to the master branch. The workflow consists of four jobs, each running on ubuntu-18.04, that set up a test environment with MongoDB, Mosquitto, and Mosquitto-extra services. In each job, checkout the repository and run a functional test using a Docker container with the fiware/orion-ci:rpm8 image, with different environment variables and test ranges for each job.
